# NPD Building Solutions

> Carpentry and renovations business based in Bairnsdale, VIC, with over 10 years of experience.

NPD Building Solutions is a local trades business servicing Bairnsdale and surrounding areas in East Gippsland, Victoria. We specialise in general carpentry, bathroom renovations, tiling, decks, pergolas, fencing, gates, pool fencing, and custom work.

## Contact
- Phone: 0427 278 285
- Email: npdbuildingsolutions@outlook.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61588392252999

## Services
- General Carpentry
- Bathroom Renovations
- High-Quality Tiling
- Decks and Pergolas
- Custom Work
- Pool Fencing
- Fencing
- Gates
